Notes: Antenna point count TBD; depends on radio system type and concrete shielding assessment per Guidance. Covered within ITM-004 engineering hours.

Notes: Scope TBD per Specification; fire alarm likely code-required (ASSUMPTION). If additional systems confirmed at preliminary design these may expand drawing set scope and hours. Not priced — awaiting County confirmation.
